title: Yip and Squeak Cobblemon
description: A remix of the official Cobblemon modpack by CobbledStudios for use on the Yip and Squeak server
body:
## About This Modpack

This modpack was designed for the streamers **CaffeineKobold** and **HakariSquish** to play with their friends and fans alike!

The core of this pack is **Cobblemon**, with a few Cobblemon add-ons, various quality-of-life improvements, and features to help with building aesthetic bases. This pack is heavier than the one it was based on, but is still performant on older machines.

## The Yip and Squeak Server

This modpack is **required** to join the offical Yip and Squeak Cobblemon server.

🖥 Server IP is avaliable on our Discord in the `#🟩cobblemon-general🟫` channel. Check the pinned message.

## Support

💬 Having issues? Reach out on Discord — we’ll do our best to help you get set up!

[![Banner for the Yip and Squeak Discord server](https://discord.com/api/guilds/1297038236631306293/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.com/invite/vYSbv2fhaQ)

[👉 Join the Yip and Squeak Discord!](https://discord.com/invite/vYSbv2fhaQ)

## Modpack Contents

This is based on the [Cobblemon Official Modpack [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/project/5FFgwNNP) and includes most of what that pack came with, and some modifications as well as additional content.

**Mods:**
- [Advancements Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/tLuRLqpa) - Make it easier to see which advancements you have and what's missing.
- [AmbientEnvironment](https://modrinth.com/mod/DyTvM1dv) - Adds color noise to biome colors.
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV) - Displays more information on the HUD about food-related values.
- [Bad Wither No Cookie Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/lL2MtE37) - Makes the wither spawn sound and other local only.
- [BedrockIfy](https://modrinth.com/mod/ox3rDp1B) - implements some useful Minecraft Bedrock Edition features into.
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/MS1ZMyR7) - Shows the actual ping number instead of just bars in the player list.
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/n6PXGAoM) - Improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful.
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/G1s2WpNo) - Adds independent camera rotation for third-person view.
- [Blåhaj of Undying](https://modrinth.com/mod/aJb4vlkM) - Replaces the totem of undying with a Blåhaj.
- [Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/joEfVgkn) - Pick up chests, animals, and other tile entities.
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wb5oqrBJ) - Adds player heads next to their chat messages and the player list.
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/3azQ6p0W) - Bookmark certain worlds, keeping them on top and preventing deletion.
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wnxd13zP) - Clumps xp orbs together.
- [CobbleDollars](https://modrinth.com/mod/s7N7AsqL) - Adds money and merchants for Cobblemon.
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/MdwFAVRL) - Open-source Pokémon mod for Fabric.
- [Cobblemon Capture XP](https://modrinth.com/mod/LBl4Qguc) - Grants EXP for your team when you capture a wild Pokémon.
- [Cobblemon Fight or Flight Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cTdIg5HZ) - Makes pokemon run away or fight back when agitated.
- [Cobblemon Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/dba1h0rW) - Knowlogy Book addon with wiki information about the Cobblemon mod.
- [Cobblemon Repel](https://modrinth.com/mod/u8TYP2M6) - New blocks that prevent Pokémon spawns in a radius.
- [Cobblemon Spawn Notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/LPuJjiQz) - Notifies chat when a Legendary and/or Shiny Pokemon shows up.
- [Cobblemon UI Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/5WwmqQHF) - Quality of life tweaks for Cobblemon's user interface.
- [Cobblemon - Show Held Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/bDx3sk7a) - Shows your Pokémon's held items in the world.
- [Cobblemon: Ride On!](https://modrinth.com/mod/vXREhDPP) - Allows you to ride some Pokémon.
- [Cobblemon Poképedia: Cobblepedia](https://modrinth.com/mod/2obPz7jf) - An in-game Poképedia wiki book for Cobblemon using Patchouli.
- [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/ItmVb4zY) - Adds Pokémon breeding to Cobblemon.
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/1IjD5062) - Support for various OptiFine textures formats.
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/xv94TkTM) - Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu.
- [CPM SVC Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/xVbeCJyB) - Adds compatibility between Customizable Player Models and Simple Voice Chat.
- [Crafting Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/DMu0oBKf) - Allows you to rotate, balance or clear the crafting matrix by the press of a button.
- [CraftPresence](https://modrinth.com/mod/DFqQfIBR) - Discord rich presence support.
- [Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/MI1LWe93) - A mod which overhauls the vanilla creepers.
- [Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/h1E7sQNL) - Allows player model customization.
- [Dismount Entity](https://modrinth.com/mod/H7N61Wcl) - Allows players to dismount mobs from mounted entities without breaking them.
- [Double Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/JrvR9OHr) - Opens and closes adjacent doors on interaction with them.
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZcR9weSm) - Dynamic Crosshair that changes shape based on what is targeted.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle.
- [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/UVtY3ZAC) - Provides a way to get enchantment descriptions from enchanted books.
- [Enhanced Attack Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/eTy17BBS) - Uses the attack indicator for more than just melee attacks.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) - Hides entities that are not visible to save on performance.
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/WhbRG4iK) - Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks.
- [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wq5SjeWM) - Customize the Minecraft title screen.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) - Memory usage optimizations.
- [FeyTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wa72oW2W) - Mod for optimizing signs and beacons.
- [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/s9gIPDom) - Allows player model customization.
- [FiguraSVC](https://modrinth.com/mod/zDF68701) - Adds  compatibility between Figura and Simple Voice Chat.
- [HD Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/FzE9gshV) - Allows higher res player skins.
- [Headpat a Friend!](https://modrinth.com/mod/vETxChiy) - Give headpats to other players.
- [Highlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/Vz96hXMh) - Makes mouseover bounding box align more with the block model.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft.
- [Inventory Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/Boon8xwi) - Basic inventory tweaks.
- [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ibSyLAz) - Quick, simple, and lightweight inventory sorting.
- [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/REfW2AEX) - Adds the ability to walk around while in inventories.
- [InvMoveCompats](https://modrinth.com/mod/6IpcGP7T) - Addon for InvMove that adds additional mod compatibilities.
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U) - Shader pack support.
- [Iron Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/7mHyGgvW) - Improved chests for Minecraft.
- [Item Highlighter](https://modrinth.com/mod/cVNW5lr6) - Highlights newly picked-up items in your inventory.
- [Knowlogy Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/V4OTaHaq) - An expandable wiki-like book with documentation about the game.
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/fQEb0iXm) - Optimizes the Minecraft networking stack.
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/yBW8D80W) - Adds dynamic lights to Minecraft.
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/uLbm7CG6) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages.
- [Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/vE2FN5qn) - Improves performance by tweaking mob despawn rules.
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/yjvKidNM) - The Light Overlay Mod with a twist.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) - No-compromises game logic optimization mod.
- [Longer Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/f4P7fNKN) - Makes chat history much longer.
- [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/EltpO5cN) - Makes loot chest in generated structures instanced per player and visually unique.
- [Macaw's Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/GURcjz8O) - A simple mod that adds a lot of bridges.
- [Macaw's Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/kNxa8z3e) - Adds vanilla doors with every wood color and new unique doors.
- [Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/GmwLse2I) - Adds new vanilla styled fences, walls and gates.
- [Macaw's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/dtWC90iB) - Decorate your world with wardrobes, drawers, chairs, desks, tables and more.
- [Macaw's Holidays](https://modrinth.com/mod/rH20L2Lp) - Adds Holiday decorations.
- [Macaw's Lights and Lamps](https://modrinth.com/mod/w4an97C2) - Adds vanilla styled lamps, torches, street lamps, and more.
- [Macaw's Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/okE6QVAY) - Adds custom drawn paintings to fit in your world.
- [Macaw's Paths and Pavings](https://modrinth.com/mod/VRLhWB91) - Adds vanila styled paths and pavings.
- [Macaw's Roofs](https://modrinth.com/mod/B8jaH3P1) - Build roofs with actual roofs instead of stairs.
- [Macaws Stairs](https://modrinth.com/mod/iP3wH1ha) - Adds new Vanilla styled Stairs, Handrails for Stairs and Balconies.
- [Macaw's Trapdoors](https://modrinth.com/mod/n2fvCDlM) - Adds vanila trapdoors in every plank variation.
- [Macaw's Windows](https://modrinth.com/mod/C7I0BCni) - Adds lots of Windows, Mosaic Glass, Blinds, and more.
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/gPCdW0Wr) - Makes bubble particles that rise to the water surface.
- [Mine Little Pony](https://modrinth.com/mod/JBjInUXM) - Turns compatible players into ponies.
- [Monsters in the Closet](https://modrinth.com/mod/GMA8jFBD) - Highlights the mobs that are preventing you from sleeping.
- [MoreCobblemonTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/5KWlJ2HC) - Adds PC Box names, wallpapers, and more.
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/aC3cM3Vq) - Adds various functions to the mouse buttons in inventories.
- [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/fPetb5Kh) - Allows you to locate biomes anywhere in the world.
- [NetherPortalFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/nPZr02ET) - Ensures correct destinations when travelling through Portals.
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/qQyHxfxd) - Makes chat unreportable where possible.
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/MPCX6s5C) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person.
- [Only Hammers And Excavators](https://modrinth.com/mod/OwtcCsNI) - Adds hammers & excavators that mine a 3x3 area.
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/nrikgvxm) - Replaces weather with prettier particle effects.
- [Particular](https://modrinth.com/project/B1CcCd9h) - Enhances Minecraft's ambience with hand-crafted effects.
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/rcTfTZr3) - Adds better footstrap sounds to players and mobs.
- [Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bqnfeesx) - Adds dynamic and reactive music for better immersion.
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium.
- [RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/Cnejf5xM) - Allows you to harvest crops with right click.
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nfn13YXA) - An easy way to browse recipes.
- [Roughly Enough Professions (REP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/V8XJ8f5f) - An REI addon that adds profession workstations.
- [Show Me Your Skin!](https://modrinth.com/mod/bD7YqcA3) - A mod to hide or customize armor rendering.
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/2M01OLQq) - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory.
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/9eGKb6K1) - A working voice chat in Minecraft.
- [SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs for Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/yFqR0DNc) - integrating TMs and TRs from Pokémon.
- [Slimy Floor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/slimyfloor) - Display slime particles when walking in a slime chunk area.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimizations for Minecraft.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) - Additional eye-candy features for Sodium.
- [Sodium Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/vqqx0QiE) - Adds new features and customization to Sodium.
- [Sodium Leaf Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/M25bkObt) - Smart leaf culling algorithm for Sodium.
- [Sodium Options API](https://modrinth.com/mod/Es5v4eyq) - Improved category menu, with drop-down support for Reese's Sodium Options.
- [Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/EIa1eiMm) - Smooth lighting to non-full blocks.
- [Sophisticated Backpacks (Unoffical Fabric port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ouNrBQtq) - Yet another backpack mod.
- [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/l6YH9Als) - Performance profiler for Minecraft clients, servers and proxies.
- [Stendhal](https://modrinth.com/mod/BWloQ9jK) - Enhanced visual utilities for books, signs, anvil and the in-game chat.
- [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guitPqEi) - Interactive bulk storage solution.
- [SwingThrough](https://modrinth.com/mod/JyKlunuD) - Allows targeting mobs through grass, crops, and flowers.
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/8oi3bsk5) - Adds almost 100 new biomes, using just Vanilla blocks.
- [Tim's Ultimately Comprehensive Cobblemon Edits of Destiny](https://modrinth.com/mod/6VWXftgW) - Various fixes for Cobblemon.
- [Title Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/8zYE8DiW) - Makes titles displayed on-screen always fit on the screen.
- [ToolTipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/2RKFTmiB) - Fixes ToolTips from running off the screen.
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/rlloIFEV) - Unique and upgradeable backpacks with customisation.
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/rI0hvYcd) - Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles.
- [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/7y4lnTPk) - Adds splashes and wakes while traveling on water.
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/LOpKHB2A) - Teleport back to activated waystones.
- [WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/6AQIaxuO) - Adds an ingame tooltip with information about what you are looking at.
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/1bokaNcj) - Adds a minimap to the corner of the screen.
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcUtCpym) - Adds a full screen world map which shows what you explored.
- [YOSBR](https://modrinth.com/mod/WwbubTsV) - Applies modpack config pre-sets while respecting your custom ones.

**Optional Mods:**
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/uCdwusMi) - See farther without turning your game into a slide show. This is disabled by default for performance reasons.

**Mod Dependencies:**
- [Aalmanac](https://modrinth.com/mod/Gi02250Z) - Required by Let Me Despawn.
- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/lhGA9TYQ) - Required by REI, RightClickHarvest, and SimpleTMs.
- [Bad Packets](https://modrinth.com/mod/ftdbN0KK) - Required by WTHIT.
- [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/MBAkmtvl) - Required by Crafting Tweaks, Inventory Essentials, NetherPortalFix, and Waystones.
- [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/uy4Cnpcm) - Required by Enchantment Descriptions.
- [CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/IwCkru1D) - Required by Headpat a Friend, and Show Me Your Skin.
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) - Required by a lot of mods.
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/e0M1UDsY) - Required by Dismount Entity, and Double Doors.
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) - Core API module providing key hooks and intercompatibility features required by all mods.
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ha28R6CL) - Required by a few mods.
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/ohNO6lps) - Required by Sophisticated Core.
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/8BmcQJ2H) - Required by Creeper Overhaul.
- [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/5faXoLqX) - Required by Item Highlighter.
- [JamLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/IYY9Siz8) - Required by RightClickHarvest.
- [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/J81TRJWm) - Required by FancyMenu.
- [Lavender](https://modrinth.com/mod/D5h9NKNI) - Required by Knowlogy Book.
- [Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/CVT4pFB2) - Required by FancyMenu.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) - Required by many mods.
- [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/project/ccKDOlHs) - Required by Knowlogy Book.
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/nU0bVIaL) - Required by Cobblemon Poképedia: Cobblepedia.
- [Prickle](https://modrinth.com/mod/aaRl8GiW) - Required by various mods.
- [Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/G1hIVOrD) - Required by Highlight.
- [Resourceful Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/M1953qlQ) - Required by Highlight.
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/fuuu3xnx) - Required by Controlling
- [Sodium Options Mod Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/Yg1VT27P) - Adds compatibility for various mods through Sodium Options API.
- [Sophisticated Core (Unofficial Fabric port)](https://modrinth.com/project/9jxwkYQL) - Required for Sophisticated Backpacks (Unoffical Fabric port).
- [TCDCommons API](https://modrinth.com/mod/Eldc1g37) - Required by Better Statistics Screen.
- [TxniLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/vBbPDuOs) - Required by Sodium Options Mod Compat.
- [UniLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/nT86WUER) - Required by CraftPresence.
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/1eAoo2KR) - Required by Dynamic Crosshair, and Particle Rain.

External Resource Packs:
- [Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/project/uvpymuxq) - Iproves the appearance of leaves
- [Cobblemon Classic Grass Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/vtFYGarZ) - Gives you the real Pokémon feeling in Cobblemon! (disabled by default)
- [Cobblemon Classic Water GEN1/2 Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/eilUnzUG) - water is changed into a Pokemon GEN1/2 style water. (disabled by default)
- [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/project/gfiYlQU0) - Cobblemon inspired GUI Textures and Sounds
- Appleskins Cobblemon UI Fix By linuxpony - Quick and dirty compatibility fix for Appleskins and Cobblemon UI. Permission is granted to all under MPL-2.0. It's not posted anywhere else.

Shader Packs:
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/project/HVnmMxH1) - (disabled by default) - Recommended shader pack.
- [Bliss Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader) - (disabled by default) Recommended shader pack for Distant Horizons users as Complementary is incompatible. Additionally, this is a developent build [from their GitHub](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader) as the builds on Modrinth don't yet support DH.

Song Packs (for Reactive Music):
- Adventure Redefined (Modified) - The default Reactive Music soundpack, but with the Menu music removed by linuxpony. Adopts the same license as the mod. This modified song pack isn't posted anywhere else. 

## Special Thanks

**Special thanks** to the [Cobbled Studios](https://modrinth.com/organization/xDVugH2u) team and their modpack, [Cobblemon Official Modpack [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/project/5FFgwNNP), which was used as the base for this project. Their modpack was licensed under the MPL-2.0 at the time of use.
